_comment: SAMPLE ONLY — sanitized for public reference. Not a real production attestation.

attester.name: Jordan Lee
attester.note: Attester identity is self-asserted. OpenSoyce does not verify attester identity.

attestation_scope.covers: packet integrity and declared evidence chain

statement: I attest that I have reviewed the evidence bundle identified by the packet digest above and that the declared records reflect the trust-decision chain for this component to the best of my knowledge.

non_claims.claim: This attestation is not a security certification or compliance finding.
OpenSoyce does not verify the identity of the attester beyond what is self-asserted.
Attestation does not guarantee the software is free of vulnerabilities.

signature.note: Signature values redacted. See opensoyce.vercel.app/trust for live verified examples.
